bead.title: metric: FEAT-005/TD-005 amendments + library/artifacts/met/ template bundle
bead.description: Amend FEAT-005 (artifact convention) to register the metric: top-level frontmatter block (schema_version: 1, unit, direction, goal, budget, source: exec|external, scope) — lives outside ddx: so unknown fields stay inert. Amend TD-005 (metric runtime history) to confirm exec-runs collection ownership. Author library/artifacts/met/ template bundle for plugin authors.
bead.acceptance: 1. FEAT-005 has metric: block schema. 2. TD-005 references exec-runs collection (no rename to metric-runs). 3. library/artifacts/met/{template,prompt,examples} bundle exists. 4. ddx doc audit clean.
